titleStmt.title: SII 41.370: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 370. (A.R. No. 585 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north wall of the goddess temple in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple in Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Registers an order in the name of the deity (of Vijayamaṅgalam ?) addressed to the śivabrāhmaṇa priests of all temples in Kuṟuppu-nāḍu asking them to give one fourth share of their income to the musicians (ukachchar) and enjoy the rest themselves, as per the custom prevailing in Vaḍa-parichāranāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caṇḍeśuraṉ Olai sākarañcūḻ vaiyyattuk kaṇṭiśvaraṉ karummārā paṇṭe Aṟañcetāṉ cetāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ
pātan tiṟampāmaṟ ceṉṉimel vaittu . Aruḷāl Āticaṇṭeśvaraṉ Ātecam nampaṭṭarkaḷ kuṟuppu nāṭṭu civappirāma
ṇaṟkum tirumuṟṟattil nampimārukkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu taṅkaḷ nāṭṭil mātevar koyil tirumuṟṟam pi
ḷḷaiyār koyil piṭāriyār koyil maṟṟumuḷḷa śrīkoyilkaḷilum vaṭaparicāranāṭṭu mariyātippaṭiye
Ukaccaṟku nālattoru kūṟu kuṭuttu mukkūṟun tāṅkaḷ Aṉupokippārkaḷāka Itu cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik
koṇṭu cantirātittavarai celvatāka nam Olai kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Āticaṇṭeśvaraṉ śrīkaṇakkaṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
